__comment_spec: Spec 076 SCOPE-6b — Legacy retirement observability fragment (SCN-075-A04). Renders the residual-usage telemetry the spec 075 Scope 3 policy increments and the spec 076 Scope 6a threshold evaluator consumes. The panel queries `smackerel_legacy_command_residual_total` (registered in internal/assistant/legacyretirement/telemetry.go) over a rolling 7-day window, broken down by (command, user_bucket). user_bucket is an HMAC digest — no raw user identifiers ever appear on this dashboard. Importable into an existing Grafana instance via the Grafana HTTP API (POST /api/dashboards/db) or via Grafana's filesystem provider. Not wired into deploy/compose.deploy.yml because Grafana is not a project-owned runtime; the deploy adapter overlay binds it.
title: Smackerel — Legacy Retirement Residual Telemetry (spec 076)

panels.title: Residual legacy-command invocations — rolling 7-day count
panels.description: spec 076 SCOPE-6b panel for SCN-075-A04. Sum of `smackerel_legacy_command_residual_total` increases over the trailing 7 days, broken down by retired command and HMAC user_bucket. Drives the rollback-threshold alert in alerts.legacy_retirement.yml.tmpl — same metric, same window. user_bucket is privacy-preserving (HMAC-SHA256 hex) per spec 075 SCN-075-A11; raw user identifiers are structurally impossible because the metric's label set is closed.
